case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC. VS. JODI L DURST et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JOHN J. PUGH IN SUPPORT OF AWARD OF ATTY FEES, COSTS AND INTEREST INCURRED TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-11-2005 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW). JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DURST, JODI L $4,112.94 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $338.05 INTEREST, $192.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,163.59, SEE SCANNED DOC
